_instructions: Configure email settings below. Options for 'method': 'graph', 'smtp', 'outlook', 'log'

_method_descriptions.graph: Microsoft Graph API (recommended for O365) - requires Azure AD app registration
_method_descriptions.smtp: Direct SMTP with authentication - works with O365 or Exchange
_method_descriptions.outlook: Opens local Outlook client to compose email
_method_descriptions.log: Just logs emails to email_queue.json for manual processing

_graph_instructions: Register app at https://portal.azure.com > Azure AD > App registrations. Grant Mail.Send permission.
_smtp_instructions: For O365: smtp.office365.com:587. For Walmart internal: try smtp.wal-mart.com:25
